shows.name: A Niche
shows.desc: Welcome back to A Niche! Anika and Esha are more than able to ease you into the week every Monday morning, with their consistent banter and a stream of jams of all kinds.

shows.name: bam wham thank you ma'am
shows.desc: A sequel of sorts to "i'm losing it" last semester, Saskia returns, well ready for another helping of absolutely bonkers music choices and stories to match.

shows.name: Right Off The Bat
shows.desc: Etan once again shows us the sports side of the dial on Right Off the Bat.

shows.name: Pink Flamingos
shows.desc: "An exercise in poor taste." DJ tonii gives us all an insight into the most "clanging pots and pans" LGBTQ music around (i say this as favorably as possible, for the record). Experimental, electronic, hyperpop - if it's weird and harsh, it's got a seat at the table.

shows.name: No Cap
shows.desc: FLEX. FLEX. FLEX. FLEX. THIS DJ will keep you MOVING, and FLEXING. FLEXING. FLEXING

shows.name: The Drummarts Show
shows.desc: A discussion and analysis of film and related media be that books, comics or music. The discussion of related media can be as its own work of art or as it pertains to film.

shows.name: The Campfire
shows.desc: Show where topics of horror and the supernatural are discussed, as well as some spooky music.
